properties.displayName: GENMIN AS-SNTL-039 Fallo de ejecución de regla NTR
properties.description: Detecta fallos a la hora de ejecutar reglas del tipo NTR.
properties.query:
SentinelHealth
| where OperationName == "NRT analytics rule run"
| where Status == "Failure"
| project TimeGenerated, Object = SentinelResourceName, EventResult = Status, EventMessage = Description
